Jordan Patel
ML Engineer, 4 years experience

Summary
Machine learning engineer focused on search relevance and recommendations.

Experience
Acme Marketplace - Senior ML Engineer (2022-present)
Owned the candidate-generation service for the recommendations team.
Migrated retrieval from Elasticsearch BM25 to a FAISS-backed bi-encoder; NDCG@5 +9 percent.
Shipped a cross-encoder reranker behind a feature flag; held holdout AUC +0.04.

NimbusAI - ML Engineer (2020-2022)
Trained ranking models on click data using LightGBM and PyTorch.
Built the offline evaluation harness and weekly drift reports.

Skills
Python, PyTorch, FAISS, TorchServe, Kubernetes, FastAPI, SQL, MLflow.
